title: hampea nutricia
intro: Hampea nutricia, also known as Mexican prickly poppy or Hampea nutricia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae and is native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Hampea nutricia include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
